description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist aesthetic. The exterior walls are finished in a muted peach color, contrasted by a dark vertical accent near the front. The front facade is dominated by a large set of glass-paneled double doors or windows, framed in white, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear walls are solid, with no visible windows or openings, emphasizing privacy. The house sits on a tiled base, suggesting an urban or suburban setting, and the overall design is clean and functional with a focus on simplicity. The visible interior includes shelving or cabinetry, hinting at a practical and organized living space.
description: A modern, peach-colored house with a flat roof, large glass-paneled front doors, and a minimalist design on a tiled base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the glass-paneled double doors framed in white, with a dark vertical accent and peach-colored walls.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the house, the side of the glass doors, and the dark accent, with shelving visible inside.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid peach wall with no windows or openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another solid peach wall and the tiled base, with no visible entry or windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, no windows on sides or rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large glass-paneled double doors with a white frame, no steps or porch, and a dark vertical accent.
